zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Barsham於1524年7月8日出生在英國諾福爾可可爾吉可時，他的父親Nicholas Barsham28歲，母親Ann Harris24歲。他於1553年7月10日與Audrey Jennison在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 維斯特蓋特結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1569年1月在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可爾吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Barsham于1524年7月8日出生在英国諾福爾可可爾吉可时，他的父亲Nicholas Barsham28岁，母亲Ann Harris24岁。他于1553年7月10日与Audrey Jennison在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 維斯特蓋特结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1569年1月在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可可爾吉可。

nameMeanings.name: Barsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North, East, or West Barsham (Norfolk), or from Barsham (Suffolk).

variants.name: Basson
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Basso, based on the element bad (from badhuo) ‘battle’.
German: of French (Huguenot) origin (see 2 above). This surname is very rare in Germany. Compare   Posson  .

variants.name: Basham
meanings: English (Norfolk, Suffolk, and Essex): variant of Barsham, a habitational name from any of the places in Norfolk and Suffolk called Barsham, from the genitive case of the Old English byname Bār ‘wild boar’ + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Barsham was born on 8 July 1524, in Colkirk, Norfolk, England, his father, Nicholas Barsham, was 28 and his mother, Ann Harris, was 24. He married Audrey Jennison on 10 July 1553, in Burnham Westgate, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 8 daughters. He died in January 1569, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Colkirk, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Barsham est né le 8 juillet 1524, à Colkirk, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Barsham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ann Harris, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Audrey Jennison le 10 juillet 1553, à Burnham Westgate, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1569, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Colkirk, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.North Elmham, Norfolk, England, United K: North Elmham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Barsham am 8. Juli 1524 in Colkirk, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Barsham 28 und seine Mutter Ann Harris 24. Er hat am 10. Juli 1553 in Burnham Westgate, Norfolk, England Audrey Jennison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1569 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Colkirk, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Barsham è nato il il 8 luglio 1524 nel Colkirk, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Barsham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Ann Harris, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Audrey Jennison il 10 luglio 1553, nel Burnham Westgate, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1569, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Colkirk, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Barshamが1524年7月8日にイギリスノーフォルクコルキルクで生まれた時，父Nicholas Barshamは28歳，母Ann Harrisは24歳であった。1553年7月10日にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ウエストガトでAudrey Jennisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1569年1月に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクコルキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Barsham(이)가 1524년 7월 8일 영국 노르폴크 코커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Barsham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Harris(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1553년 7월 10일 영국 노르폴크 번함 웨스트가트에서 Audrey Jennison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1569년 1월 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 코커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Barsham nasceu em 8 de julho de 1524, em Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Barsham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ann Harris, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Audrey Jennison em 10 de julho de 1553, em Burnham Westgate, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1569, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.North Elmham, Norfolk, England, United K: North Elmham, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Barsham родился 8 июля 1524 г. в местности колкирк, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Barsham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Harris, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Audrey Jennison 10 июля 1553 г. в местности бурнам вестгэит, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер январь 1569 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности колкирк, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Barsham nació el 8 de julio de 1524, en Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Barsham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Ann Harris, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Audrey Jennison el 10 de julio de 1553, en Burnham Westgate, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en enero de 1569, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
